topics.query_en: Database normalization and functional dependency tutorial
topics.query_ar: شرح التطبيع والاعتمادية الوظيفية قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Identifying functional dependencies requires abstract logical thinking to determine how attributes uniquely determine one another.

topics.topic_en: Second Normal Form (2NF) and Partial Dependencies
topics.query_en: Second Normal Form 2NF partial dependency explained
topics.query_ar: شرح النموذج الطبيعي الثاني 2NF قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Students often struggle to distinguish between full and partial dependencies when dealing with composite primary keys.

topics.topic_en: Third Normal Form (3NF) and Transitive Dependencies
topics.query_en: Third Normal Form 3NF transitive dependency database
topics.query_ar: شرح النموذج الطبيعي الثالث 3NF قواعد البيانات
topics.reason: Recognizing transitive dependencies where non-key attributes depend on other non-key attributes can be tricky in complex tables.

topics.topic_en: Transforming E-R Diagrams into Relational Schemas
topics.topic_ar: تحويل مخطط الكيان والعلاقة إلى جداول
topics.query_en: Mapping ER diagram to relational schema database design
topics.query_ar: تحويل ER Diagram الى Relational Schema
topics.reason: Applying the specific mapping rules for weak entities, multi-valued attributes, and different relationship cardinalities is highly error-prone.

topics.query_en: Database physical file organization sequential indexed hashed
topics.query_ar: شرح File Organization في قواعد البيانات
